provenanceNote: Evidence entries whose summary says 'corpus read (audit)' are single-pass reads of research/decomp/ghidra-export/chunk_*.c with quoted code but no second verification; behavior-notes.md citations inherit that notebook's confidence.

mechanics.wikiClaim: B is a context-dependent attack (melee when appropriate, ranged otherwise); X is the secondary/special attack.

currentPort.summary: PlayerInput has attack(B held)/special(X) booleans only; stepAttacks iterates [melee,shot] ordered by static actionProfile.primary; no distance/context logic; no command vocabulary shared with AI.

evidence.summary: commandStruct(actor+0x4b0) bytes +0/+1/+4 copied to actor+0x660/+0x661/+0x591 (corpus read, audit)
same copy on the player-controlled path (corpus read, audit)

decision brain: tests transformed button word actor+0x5d4 in priority order, sets command type actor+0x585 in {1,2,3,5} via testers zz_0069a88_/zz_0069b10_/zz_0069b98_/zz_0069bf0_/zz_0069c50_/zz_0069cb0_ (corpus read, audit)
ranged command rejected when no target: if (actor+0x4a0 == 0) return 0 (corpus read, audit)
subtype actor+0x586 in 0-5; distance gates FLOAT_8043762c vs actor+0x694/+0x6a4 select charged-ranged variants (corpus read, audit)
(type,subtype) executed through per-actor table at +0x4ec (corpus read, audit)
attack-active handler branches +0x591==1/2 (melee family) vs 4/5/6 (ranged family) (corpus read, audit)

mechanics.confidence: DERIVED_ROM (pipeline structure) + BLOCKED (button-bit identities, command-struct writer, 0x585/0x586 to 0x591 correspondence, FLOAT_8043762c value)
unknowns: physical GC button -> +0x5d4 transformed-bit mapping (two corpus reads disagree on bit 0x200)
writer of the +0x4b0 command struct (player pad plumbing and CPU AI issuer both unfound)
numeric value of FLOAT_8043762c (dumpable via research/decomp/dol.py)
meaning of command value 7 and type 3

mechanics.wikiClaim: At melee range, B produces the melee attack even for borgs that normally shoot.

currentPort.summary: No distance check; actionProfile.primary fixes the melee/shot order permanently per borg.

evidence.summary: distance-gated variant selection exists in the command layer, but only proven for charged-ranged subtype selection (corpus read, audit)

unknowns: whether melee-over-ranged is distance-, target-state-, or per-borg-driven

mechanics.wikiClaim: Ranged-only and melee-only borgs exist; buttons fall through to what the borg has.

currentPort.summary: profile.hasMelee/hasShot (asset-generated) null out action defs; primary falls back to the existing kind.

evidence.summary: capability is data-driven: (type,subtype) resolved through per-actor table at +0x4ec (format unread) (corpus read, audit)
weapon unusable when cur<1 unless max==0 (infinite) (corpus read, audit)

mechanics.confidence: ASSET_INFERRED (current flags) + DERIVED_ROM (gating mechanisms) + BLOCKED (+0x4ec table format)
unknowns: +0x4ec action-table layout and its source data file

mechanics.wikiClaim: Melee differs by movement context: standing, ground dash, air dash, flying, stabbing (above enemy), jumping, neutral air, landing.

currentPort.summary: One MeleeActionDef per borg with a combo chain; startable from any non-busy state; no context variants.

evidence.summary: NEGATIVE: animation banks are flat (group,slot) enums; no movement-context axis; group 1 = 5-23 generic attack slots per borg
a real context/variant channel exists: subtype 4 set on air/elevated gate; grounded checks in testers (corpus read, audit)
+0x1d0f per-attack direction/variant selector 0-5 consumed by attack handlers (corpus read, audit)
authored per-move hitboxes with frame windows exist to back per-context attacks

mechanics.confidence: DERIVED_ROM (a variant channel exists) + WIKI_TAXONOMY_ONLY (the specific 8-context list) + BLOCKED (context -> variant -> bank/hitbox mapping)

mechanics.wikiClaim: Some borgs damage enemies by stepping on them, flying into them sword-out, air-dashing through them, or landing on them.

currentPort.summary: Not modeled; damage only via swings/specials/projectiles.

evidence.summary: persistent attack records are representable in the format (activeEnd=-1), but none was confirmed used as movement-contact damage
NEGATIVE: every state-handler body was read in (u); none applies damage as a movement side effect

unknowns: whether contact damage is authored as persistent attack hitboxes tied to movement states
per-target re-hit pacing (rehit interval would cover it)
traceNeeded: T2 extension: stomp/contact script with a giant borg

mechanics.wikiClaim: Solid projectiles (missiles, drills) are physical and can be destroyed mid-air by melee, solids, or nonsolids; nonsolid energy shots pass through each other.

currentPort.summary: Projectiles never interact with each other or with melee swings.

evidence.summary: NEGATIVE (generic path only): no proj-vs-proj loop and no solidity flag in the generic collision passes; searched zz_008893c_ spawn sites, DAT_803c477c/DAT_803c2f7c list loops, 'penetrat|pierce' strings (corpus read, audit). Per-object-type dispatch PTR_FUN_802da740 bodies remain unread, so this is NOT closed for the whole binary.

unknowns: candidate solidity field on the object struct

mechanics.wikiClaim: Projectiles can collide with and destroy other projectiles per the solid/nonsolid rules.

evidence.summary: same negative as projectile_solidity; only object-list vs object-list passes with owner/team/flag gates (corpus read, audit)

mechanics.wikiClaim: Certain attacks penetrate certain objects; melee and explosions effectively have total penetration.

currentPort.summary: stepProjectiles consumes every projectile on first valid borg hit (consumed=true; break). Melee swings already hit multiple targets once each via meleeHitUids.

evidence.summary: rehit mechanism: damage record s8+0x16 reloads per-object counter +0x4e; on expiry the hit re-applies; interval 0 = unlimited (corpus read, audit)
object despawn (object+0x10=2) is actor-flag gated (+0x281), not written by the collision resolver — persistence after hit is the structural default (corpus read, audit)

collision gate: hit allowed iff (attackerRec.flagsB & 0x4000)==0 || (targetRec.flagsB & 0x2000)!=0. WARNING: flagsB 0x4000 is also the skip-combo-falloff bit in zz_003cd5c_ step 16 — semantics not settled (corpus read, audit)
all 9 borg-family records have rehitIntervalFrames=0 and flagsB=0 — the interesting values live in generic/comhit and per-move hit-bin data

unknowns: explosion spawn-on-impact (no effect-id consumer found in the generic hit path)
true meaning of flagsB 0x4000/0x2000 in the collision gate

mechanics.wikiClaim: Gradual refill starts right after use (one shot at a time); all-at-once refill starts only when fully depleted; deployed weapons refill when the object returns/dies; Hyper Mode reloads (nearly) instantly.

currentPort.summary: Single ammo pool: refill-to-max when empty and reload cooldown expired; firing decrements and arms reload when empty. ammoMax/reloadFrames are TUNED profile values.

evidence.summary: 3 weapon cells init from the same stat row as HP: cur/prev s16 at +0x774/+0x77c/+0x784, timer f32 +0x778/.., max/type/param s16 at +0x78c-cells; refill-type-specific timer init (corpus read, audit; row source zz_0055f90_ per behavior-notes (ag))
fire gate (actor, weaponIdx, cost, actuallyFire): blocks if cur<cost, dry-run mode, decrement with prev=cur; 65+ call sites (corpus read, audit)
per-frame refill: rate float +0x768 (x FLOAT_804376c8 when +0x6fc burst set), per-weapon disable bits +0x597; type 1 gradual fractional grant; type<=0 all-at-once on timer expiry (corpus read, audit)
one-shot grant: cur+=1 clamp max (deployed-object return path) (corpus read, audit)
failed/dead deploy restores weapon-2 ammo to max; more handlers in chunk_0036.c (corpus read, audit)
max==0 means infinite ammo (corpus read, audit)
weapon-0 per-borg values extracted; G RED ammo 5 live-verified (behavior-notes (ag))

mechanics.confidence: DERIVED_ROM (mechanism end-to-end); values partially extracted (weapon 0 only)
unknowns: +0x768 rate init site AND role conflict (see open-questions Q7)

mechanics.wikiClaim: Attacks inflict statuses: freeze/shock/stun, poison, shrink/grow, pull/tether, barrier/block (blocks enemy-team projectiles).

currentPort.summary: None. BorgRuntime.paramTier fields exist but nothing consumes them.

evidence.summary: status id victim+0x71a = hitboxRecord[1]&0x3f; timer victim+0x71c max-merged from record[4]; gates: immunity +0x5a0 bit N, 0x5e0&0x20000000 (corpus read, audit)
immunity bit also zeroes HP damage (formula step 1; behavior-notes (ah))
+0x71c decrements per frame; shrink +0x70c / grow +0x70e multiply a scale-related float via LUT DAT_802dd57c (corpus read, audit)
param tier +0x74a (accum +0x74e, timer +0x750=900) indexes PTR_DAT_804339e0 rows feeding actor+0xb8/+0x1dd0/+0x5f8 (corpus read, audit)
NEGATIVE: no DoT HP-drain loop found; no OHKO path (damage floors at 1) (corpus read, audit)

mechanics.confidence: DERIVED_ROM (framework fields) + BLOCKED (per-status-id semantics, durations, which moves inflict what)
unknowns: immunity mask init from pl data

mechanics.wikiClaim: Attacks carry values controlling how fast a hit borg staggers or enters invulnerable safety.

currentPort.summary: PORTED: gauge-based stagger (down/balance gauges + record reactionFlags), balance-break-only 60 stagger i-frames, 60-frame post-hit windows, combo accum/rank, wake invincibility 60.

evidence.summary: gauge model, damage records, and windows all derived and ported; per-borg gauge init extracted (gaugeInit.json)

unknowns: exact hit->reaction state-slot transition (zz_005f00c_ lead, behavior-notes (s)/(u))
doNotDoubleApply: No per-hit flat hitstun exists in the ROM — do not add one.
No separate super-armor flag — high gauge bases model it.

mechanics.wikiClaim: Power Burst (Y, meter-gated): instantly-reloading ammo, massive speed, much higher damage; co-op sync and fusion interactions.

currentPort.summary: Nothing: no Y input field, no meter, no burst flag. damageFormula.ts already exposes attackerPairAttack/defenderPairAttack context params (default false) that map to the burst flag's damage effects.

evidence.summary: arm gate: transformed button word +0x5d4 bit 0x200 sets +0x6fb=6 (6-frame arm window) (corpus read, audit)
consumes +0x6fb, pair-match via zz_005b678_ (species table 0x802d352c), sets +0x6fc=1 and +0x6fa=1; paired path syncs headings (3192-3198) (corpus read, audit)
+0x6fc effects: outgoing damage x2.0 (FLOAT_80436f9c), incoming x0.5 (FLOAT_80436f7c) (behavior-notes (ah) steps 3/10)
+0x6fc multiplies ammo refill rate by FLOAT_804376c8 — matches wiki 'instantly-reloading ammo' directionally (corpus read, audit)
NEGATIVES: no meter accumulator in the damage path; no +0x6fc-gated speed modifier; no explicit +0x6fc clear; no hyper/burst strings in DOL (corpus read, audit)

mechanics.confidence: DERIVED_ROM (flags + activation chain + 3 effects) + BLOCKED (meter fill, activation precondition, duration, speed effects)
unknowns: speed effect channel (param tier? another field?)

mechanics.wikiClaim: Mashing buttons (or moving the stick) during certain attacks adds extra hits.

evidence.summary: press flag +0x1d10 increments counter +0x550 per frame; phase advances when 4 < +0x550 (cap 4) or +0x552 != 0 (corpus read, audit)
press edges: +0x5bc = +0x5b4 & ~+0x5b8 (corpus read, audit)
NEGATIVE: no stick-rotation accumulator; stick out-of-deadzone is a binary flag (+0x6fd & 0x40) used for direction selection only (corpus read, audit)

mechanics.confidence: DERIVED_ROM (counter+cap mechanism) + BLOCKED (which moves consume it and what an extra count does)
unknowns: downstream consumer of +0x550 (extra hitbox activations? duration extension?)

mechanics.wikiClaim: Repeated hits on the same target deal less and less damage (hidden resistance that recovers over time).

currentPort.summary: PORTED AND IDENTICAL: computeSourceDamage applies comboRankScale_802c7ca0[victim.comboRank] unless record.flagsB & 0x4000; comboAccum/comboRank grow per hit and reset on the 60-frame window expiry.

evidence.summary: accumulator +0x6c8 (0-99) rolls into rank +0x6ca (cap 0x3f); window reset chunk_0006.c:8009-8010

mechanics.confidence: DERIVED_ROM, ported. RESOLVED: the wiki mechanic IS comboRankScale_802c7ca0 — do not implement anything new.
mechanics.doubleApplicationRisk: HIGH if any agent adds a separate per-target damage-decay layer. Explicit instruction: never do this.

mechanics.wikiClaim: Teammates take reduced damage from each other; OHKO attacks ignore the reduction.

currentPort.summary: PORTED in formula (x0.25 same-team unless flagsA&0x1000; /40 block divisor exists but never activated by callers). Teammates ARE hittable in the sim: canReceiveHit excludes only self; projectiles hit any non-owner.

evidence.summary: sameTeam && !(flagsA&0x1000) -> x0.25 (FLOAT_80437024); (flagsA&0x1000) && victim+0x59c&0x1000 -> /40 (FLOAT_80437028); floor 1 -> int (behavior-notes (ah) step 18; (o))
the /40 gate's victim-side flag word source (behavior-notes (ag))
NEGATIVE: no OHKO/instant-kill damage path; damage floors at 1 (corpus read, audit). Wiki OHKO = presumably moves with hpDamage above any HP pool; flagsA&0x1000 is the FF-exemption channel.

unknowns: which real moves carry flagsA&0x1000 (per-move hit-bin data)

mechanics.wikiClaim: n/a (interaction check: wiki resistance/FF vs current combo/rank/FF scalars).

currentPort.summary: computeSourceDamage implements behavior-notes (ah) with documented defaults (heroTable 0, levels 1.0, pair/burst false, handicap neutral, force-ratio 0, block off); steps 5 and 17 unmodeled. Combo falloff + same-team + type matrix + curves live.

evidence.summary: full pipeline decoded and tables extracted (behavior-notes (ah))

mechanics.confidence: CURRENT_PORT faithful for the modeled subset
unknowns: hero flag +0x3e6 semantics in battle modes
mechanics.warning: Wire burst via existing attackerPairAttack/defenderPairAttack params; never add parallel multipliers.

currentPort.summary: actionProfiles.json generated heuristically from asset inventories (TUNED); hitboxes are radius checks; damage records mapped by 3 archetypes (MELEE=1, SHOT=0, CHARGE_OR_SPECIAL=2) in gauges.ts.

evidence.summary: hitbox containers fully decoded; per-move binding (bank -> remap slot -> records) missing
animation banks enumerable per borg; group 1 attack slots 5-23 per borg
